channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla CEO Musk Settles SEC Twitter Disclosure Case
item.description: Trust will pay $1.5 million fine with no admission of wrongdoing

item.title: Tesla Stock in Focus -- EU Rules Could Make or Break FSD Ambitions
item.description: Tesla Faces Regulatory Showdown in Europe as FSD Approval Debate Heats Up

item.title: Tesla faces pushback on self-driving approval in EU
item.description: Regulators raise concerns ahead of approval

item.title: Two Numbers for Tesla Stock on Tuesday. Which One Matters More.
item.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk hopes that FSD will advance to unsupervised autonomous driving by the end of the year. Achieving that would be a catalyst for Tesla stock, demonstrating that widespread use of truly self-driving cars is just around the corner. Musk missed the deadline by 11 days, potentially c...

item.title: Tech Stocks Eclipse Iran, Oil as the Market’s Mover. Why That Will Continue.
item.description: Elon Musk settles over Twitter stock disclosures, Palantir beats expectations, Trump’s tariff risks persist, and more news to start your day.

item.title: Auddia Highlights LT350’s AI Infrastructure that Doesn’t Compete for Power, Water, or Land as Large Datacenters Face Restrictions
item.description: Tesla halts datacenter development due to local infrastructure constraints Denmark halts new projects amid AI driven power crisis LT350 offers a distributed, grid-supportive, AI infrastructure alternative built for community compatibility and scale BOULDER, Colo., May 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) --...

item.title: Elon Musk says saving for retirement 'won't matter.' I'm not banking on it.
item.description: Saving for retirement in 10 or 20 years will be irrelevant, Elon Musk recently said. Financial advisers aren't buying that advice.

item.title: Market Chatter: Tesla's Full Self-Driving Technology May Hit Regulatory Roadblock in European Union
item.description: Tesla's (TSLA) full self-driving system could be facing skepticism from European regulators toward t

item.title: Elon Musk settles SEC Twitter disclosures lawsuit for $1.5 million
item.description: STORY: Elon Musk has settled a U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission lawsuit against him for a $1.5 million fine. The suit accuses the world's richest person of waiting too long in 2022 to disclose his initial purchases of shares in Twitter, now known as X.

item.title: Exclusive-Tesla faces EU skepticism over automated-driving tech, records show
item.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk has projected confidence that the European Union will soon green-light the carmaker's "Full Self-Driving" (FSD) system, but emails from some European regulators show marked skepticism toward the technology and its stated safety benefits. Tesla's "FSD (Supervised)" technology g...

item.title: Tesla owners keep coming back for more
item.description: Tesla has taken home the “Overall Loyalty to Make” award from S&P Global Mobility for the fourth consecutive year, reinforcing Tesla owners’ willingness to come back. The 2025 awards are based on S&P Global Mobility’s analysis of 13.6 million new retail vehicle registrations in the U.S. from Octo...

item.title: Elon Musk Settles X Lawsuit for a Cup of (Cheap) Coffee. What It Means for SpaceX’s IPO.
item.description: The billionaire is on the hook for $1.5 million for failing to disclose his 5% stake in Twitter in a timely fashion.

item.title: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Coinbase, AMD, Palantir, Tesla, eBay, GameStop, FedEx, UPS, Micron, and More
item.description: STOCKSTOWATCHTODAY BLOG Stocks fell Monday and oil prices rose after the United Arab Emirates’ Ministry of Defense said it detected four missiles coming from Iran. Earlier, the U.S. military’s Central Command denied a report that Iran had struck an American warship in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Tesla Semi can save over $400K vs diesel, but there are big ‘ifs’
item.description: With the Tesla Semi now rolling off the high-volume production line at a qupted price of $290,000 for the 500-mile version, we ran a full total cost of ownership (TCO) analysis against a comparable diesel Class 8 truck. At current diesel prices of $5.35 per gallon, the results are striking. The T...

item.title: Tesla Semi And Terafab Shift Focus To Vertical Integration And AI
item.description: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) has begun producing its first high volume Tesla Semi trucks at its Nevada facility. The company is also launching Terafab, an internal semiconductor foundry developed with support from Intel. These projects aim to support Tesla's commercial vehicle, robotics, and autonomous ...

item.title: Elon Musk's Tesla drops huge news for its customers
item.description: Nine years after Elon Musk first unveiled it on a darkened stage, the Tesla Semi has finally crossed the line that separates promise from product. On April 29, Tesla posted a single image on X: workers inside the Nevada factory, the first Semi off the high-volume production line. After years of ...

item.title: Ouster Stock Is Up. Its New Lidar Answers an Elon Musk Problem.
item.description: Ouster has launched a lidar that sees in color. Convincing Elon Musk to use lidar will be no easy task.

item.title: After 10 Billion FSD Miles, Tesla Drivers Face a New Problem.
item.description: Tesla and Tesla drivers face a new problem with the company’s Full Self-Driving product. Barron’s has reviewed and tested Tesla’s FSD consistently since 2022. In 2023, we likened FSD to a teenager with a learner’s permit.

item.title: Elon Musk Is Now Worth More Than an Average Country’s GDP
item.description: Elon Musk's net worth hit $800 billion, matching Rockefeller's 1913 share. He responded with a $10 trillion target.

item.title: Tesla's Robotaxi Opportunity Is Dead In Light Of Waymo's Dominance
Don’t Buy Tesla Stock. Buy Options Instead.
item.description: Tesla stock is in a rut as investors await more progress on artificial-intelligence businesses such as robo-taxis and robots. With shares struggling to regain $400, stock options might be a better bet. Susquehanna derivatives analyst Christopher Jacobson screened for stocks in which a pick-up in...

item.title: Nikola founder and convicted fraudster attacks Tesla Semi with some decent points
item.description: Trevor Milton, the convicted fraudster who founded Nikola Motors, took to LinkedIn to attack Tesla Semi’s economics with a point-by-point takedown. Despite his near-total lack of credibility, a couple of his arguments actually hold up. Milton, who was convicted of securities fraud for lying to in...

item.title: ARKX Faces a Concentration Crisis as SpaceX IPO Looms Over Space ETF Holdings
item.description: ARK Space Exploration & Innovation ETF (NYSEARCA:ARKX) has rewarded patient holders lately, with shares near $33 after a 74% one-year run and a 13% year-to-date gain. That kind of move tends to bury the risk conversation. It shouldn’t.

item.title: Tesla Rival Jumps On Strong Orders For Updated Model 3 Competitor
item.description: Orders for the updated Xiaomi SU7 EV sedan, a direct Tesla Model 3 rival, have topped 70,000. Tesla does not plan to release an updated Model 3 in China this year.

item.title: Tesla Model X Becomes Fastest-Selling Used Car in U.S.
item.description: Falling prices and EV demand boost resale momentum

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi service in Austin achieves monumental new accomplishment
item.description: Tesla Robotaxi services in Austin have been operating since last Summer, but Tesla has admittedly been delayed in its expansion of the geofence, fleet size, and other details in a bid to prioritize safety as new technology rolls out. But those barriers are being broken with new guardrails being r...

item.title: Meet 3 Upcoming Monster Artificial Intelligence (AI) IPOs That Will Soon Join Meta, Tesla, and Broadcom in the $1 Trillion Club
item.description: Several major private artificial intelligence companies are expected to make their public market debuts this year or next.

item.title: Tesla’s New EV Charger Looks Familiar, But It’s Nothing Like Its Predecessors
item.description: The $20,000 Basecharger looks like a regular V4 Supercharger, but it hides a serious upgrade inside.

item.title: Tesla Cybercab just rolled through Miami inside a glass box
item.description: Tesla set up an “Autonomy Pop-Up” at Lummus Park in Miami Beach from April 29 through May 3, 2026, embedded within the official F1 Miami Grand Prix Fan Fest. The centerpiece was a Cybertruck towing the Cybercab inside a glass display case marked “Future is Autonomous,” rolling through the beachfr...

item.title: SpaceX will pay Elon Musk a bonus if he gets at least 1 million people to live on Mars — here's the plan
item.description: Details from the SpaceX IPO registration statement are leaking out and 200 million super-voting restricted shares are on the line for Musk, if he can hit certain milestones.

item.title: Tesla reaches 10 billion FSD miles — is there’s a magical milestone for autonomy
item.description: Tesla’s Full Self-Driving (Supervised) fleet has crossed the 10 billion mile mark, according to the automaker’s updated safety page . It’s the threshold that CEO Elon Musk himself set earlier this year as the data milestone needed for “safe unsupervised” driving. The achievement represents a mass...

item.title: Is Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
item.description: Is TSLA a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Tesla, Inc. on Eric Ding’s Substack.

item.title: Bill Gates Once Called Tesla's Semi Truck Impractical, But Gavin Newsom May Need Elon Musk's All-Electric Hauler To Bolster Clean Energy Bid
item.description: Microsoft Corp co-founder Bill Gates deemed Elon Musk‘s vision of producing the Tesla Inc. Semi Truck as impractical, but the saleable version of the all-electric truck just entered mass production. Bill Gates On Tesla Semi On Thursday, influencer Sawyer Merritt posted on the social media platfor...

item.title: First Tesla Semi At High Production Line Completed
item.description: The above photograph shows a huge number of Tesla employees around their first Tesla Semi completed at the vehicle’s high-production line. Tesla has an enormous number of employees that are not the CEO. Their work counts more than the activities of one executive.

item.title: Elon’s Terafab Is Moving at “Light Speed” — and That Could Mean Big Things for Tesla
item.description: Elon Musk’s Terafab may very well be the most ambitious undertaking Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) or, really, any of his other incredible companies to date. Make no mistake, highly-capable Optimus robots, reusable rockets that deliver payouts into space, and even longer-term plans of going to Mars are not ...

item.title: Finally, Some Good News for Tesla Investors
item.description: The robotaxi rollout is progressing, albeit at a slow pace, but that might be what investors need right now.

item.title: Rivian Tops Q1 Estimates, but Investors Rightly Remain Wary
item.description: Electric vehicle stocks have faced a bumpy road lately, with softening demand, tariff worries, and high interest rates testing even the strongest players. Investors wonder if newer entrants like Rivian can scale fast enough to compete against Tesla’s (NASDAQ:TSLA) volume machine or Ford’s (NYSE:F...

item.title: This 380,000-Mile Tesla Model 3 Has Its Original Battery. Range Loss Is Huge
item.description: A high-mileage 2019 Model 3 Standard Range Plus drives just fine, but it has lost around a third of its original battery capacity.

item.title: Tesla’s xAI And SpaceX Deals Reshape Growth Story And Governance Questions
item.description: Tesla disclosed over $500 million in revenue from transactions with Elon Musk controlled companies, including xAI and SpaceX, in an amended annual filing. The filing highlights deepening business ties between NasdaqGS:TSLA and Musk's other ventures, raising related party and governance questions....

item.title: Elon Musk's Robotaxi Plans Take Shape With Dallas, Houston Rollout, But Tesla Is Still Far Behind Waymo
item.description: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) recently ramped up its Robotaxi operations in Texas, providing unsupervised Robotaxi rides in Dallas and Houston, while it was already providing rides in Austin. While the ramp-up in Cybercab production could provide another boost in its Robotaxi exploits, Tesla remains f...

item.title: Top Selling Electric Vehicles in the World — March 2026
item.description: Tesla wins gold and silver in a market running at different speeds. BEVs vs. PHEVs Plugin vehicle registrations were up 5% year over year (YoY) in March, ending the month at around 1.7 million units.

item.title: Billionaire Charlie Munger Called Elon Musk Talented, Unusual, And Peculiar— 'I Don't Buy Him And I Don't Sell Him Short'
item.description: Not every billionaire critique comes with a compliment baked in. But when Charlie Munger sized up Tesla CEO Elon Musk, he didn't dismiss him or cheer him on. He did something rarer.

item.title: Cybercab at F1 Fan Fest in Miami
item.description: Tesla booth at the Miami F1 fan fest has free Cybercab hats for Tesla owners and a Cybertruck sledge hammer exhibit submitted by /u/Joshalander [link] [comments]

item.title: Elon Musk Just Announced Fanastic News to Nvidia Stock Investors
item.description: These longtime market-beaters still have quite aggressive ambitions.

item.title: Tesla Semi gets new product launch as mass manufacturing hits Plaid Mode
item.description: The Tesla Semi is getting a new production launch as mass manufacturing on the all-electric truck is gearing up to hit Plaid Mode. Tesla has introduced a game-changing addition to its commercial charging lineup with the new 125 kW Basecharger for Semi . Launched this week as part of the new “Semi...

item.title: Elon Musk Testifies He 'Didn't Read' OpenAI's For-Profit Fine Print, Claims Sam Altman Misled Him: 'Can't Steal A Charity'
item.description: On Thursday, Elon Musk told a California courtroom that he backed OpenAI with millions of dollars under the belief it would remain a nonprofit focused on humanity. Musk Says OpenAI Abandoned Its Original Nonprofit Mission During cross-examination, Musk testified that while he was aware of prelimi...

item.title: Amazon and Tesla Drive One-Third of FDIS as U.S. Spending Surges Despite Recession-Level Sentiment
item.description: Consumer discretionary names live or die on whether households feel comfortable opening their wallets, and right now those signals are flashing in opposite directions. Right now those signals are crossing in unusual directions: the University of Michigan Consumer Sentiment Index sits at 53.3 in M...

item.title: 1966 Ford Mustang converted into a Tesla with working ‘Full Self-Driving’
item.description: A Tesla auto parts shop owner in Sacramento spent about $40,000 and two years converting a 1966 Ford Mustang into a fully functional Tesla — complete with the Model 3’s dual-motor drivetrain, 15-inch touchscreen, and working “Full Self-Driving” (Supervised). It’s likely the first non-Tesla vehicl...

item.title: This Tesla owner won $10k in court for Tesla’s FSD lies. Tesla is still fighting him.
item.description: For over a decade now, Tesla has sold a promise of vehicles that can drive themselves, even stating that every car it produced had all the hardware for self-driving . But after years of the company being unable to deliver, some owners want their money back. Ben Gawiser is one of those owners, who...

item.title: Tesla revises new Intervention Reporting system with Full Self-Driving
item.description: Tesla has revised its new Intervention Reporting system within the Full Self-Driving suite that now categorizes reasons that drivers take over when the semi-autonomous driving functionality is active. It is the second revision to the program as Tesla is trying to make it easier to decipher driver...
